title: Dev Loop Config
description: Configuration schema for pi-dev-loops dev-loop workflow. Validates .pi/dev-loop/defaults.yaml and overrides.yaml.

default.description: Default strategy: local-first (phase-based local work) or github-first (PR/issue-based remote work).

conductor.description: Model to use for the conductor/orchestrator agent.

roles.description: Per-angle model overrides. Keys are angle names, values are model identifiers.

refinement.description: Refinement fan-out settings for parallel review variant generation.

fanOut.description: Number of parallel review variants to generate.

roles.description: Role/angle names used for refinement review variants.

draft.description: Draft gate: runs before marking PR ready for review. One-time transition — clean evidence survives head changes.

angles.description: Review angles for the draft gate. Each angle resolves to a persona via the personas registry.

required.description: Whether this gate must pass before proceeding.

preApproval.description: Pre-approval gate: runs before declaring merge-ready. Per-head — must re-run on every new head SHA.

angles.description: Review angles for the pre-approval gate. Each angle resolves to a persona via the personas registry.

required.description: Whether this gate must pass before proceeding.

autonomy.description: Autonomy policy: which gates require operator confirmation (stop points).

stopAt.description: Gates where the workflow stops for operator confirmation. Everything else auto-continues.

personas.description: Persona registry: maps review angle names to agent personas with focused prompts. Consumers can add custom angles and override existing prompts.

additionalProperties.description: A persona entry for a review angle.

persona.description: Agent persona name. Must exist in .pi/agents/<name>.agent.md.

prompt.description: Focused review instruction for the reviewer agent. Included in the reviewer's briefing.

defaultModel.description: Optional model override for this angle. null = use persona default.
